name: code-yeongyu/lazycodex
summary: OMO's Codex Light workflow harness built around `ulw-loop`, combining durable goal state, ledger-backed progress tracking, evidence-based completion checks, goal reconciliation, and final quality-gate validation.
evidence: `ulw-loop` persists goals and an append-only ledger under `.omo/ulw-loop`, then refuses completion until every success criterion is recorded as passing.
Checkpointing reconciles OMO's active goal with Codex goal snapshots, validates final quality-gate JSON, and records structured steering mutations with evidence and rationale.
